key_themes: Strong analyst upgrades and buy ratings
Pre-earnings stock caution and price pullback
summary: Carpenter Technology (CRS) shows robust positive momentum from recent analyst upgrades, including JPMorgan raising its target to $465 and KeyBanc to $453, alongside a consensus 'Moderate Buy' rating and expectations for Q3 earnings growth to $2.60 EPS on 8.6% revenue increase. The company benefits from surging aerospace demand and raised FY26 guidance, though shares have dipped slightly ahead of the April 29 earnings report due to profit-taking. No major risks evident beyond typical pre-earnings volatility.
